name: chromium-bookmarks
title: Chromium Bookmarks
description: Search bookmarks from any chromium browser installed on your system
author: aurelleb

commands.name: search-bookmarks
commands.title: (DEV) Search Bookmarks
commands.subtitle: Search Bookmarks
commands.description: Search bookmarks from any chromium browser installed on your system. The browsers are automatically detected.

preferences.name: show-favicons
preferences.title: Show Favicons
preferences.label: Show website favicons
preferences.description:
Show website favicons instead of the default bookmark icon. 
Note: This may request favicon URLs from a remote provider.

preferences.name: bookmark-display-limit
preferences.title: Bookmark Display Limit
preferences.description:
Maximum number of bookmarks to render at once. Lower = Faster! 
Use 0 to render all bookmarks.

preferences.name: show-url-in-subtitle
preferences.title: Show Full URL
preferences.label: Show full URL instead of domain
preferences.description: Display the full bookmark URL as the subtitle instead of only the domain.
